response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed the video, which shows a 3D concert performance featuring multiple Hololive VTubers.
2. The song is clearly "Kirameki Rider" (キラメキライダー☆) based on on-screen cues and lyrics.
3. Searched for "キラメキライダー lyrics" to find the full lyrics for the song.
4. The song "Kirameki Rider" is an original song by "hololive IDOL PROJECT".
5. The lyrics are in Japanese, and an English translation is provided in the scene object.
6. The entire video is one continuous song performance.
response.global_summary: This video features a 3D concert performance of the song 'Kirameki Rider' (キラメキライダー☆) by various Hololive VTubers. The performance involves multiple groups of VTubers performing the song in a large concert venue.

scenes.description: Opening scene featuring multiple VTubers on stage performing 'Kirameki Rider'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
生まれたてのドキドキを 響かせよう
最高の時間 最高の仲間と
キラメキに乗って☆ (イェーイ)
覚えてるかな？ 最初の歌 (なつかしいね)
私 声が震えていた (ほんの少し)
あの日から続く未来は
みんなと掴んだ今日だよ
もっともっともっともっと
加速するハート (いっしょに)
行くよ どこまでも (Are You Ready？)
準備はOK？ひらけ！！
夢のトビラを (123)
(キラメキライダー☆)

生まれたてのドキドキを 響かせよう
最高の時間 最高の仲間と
ここにいるよ 見つけてくれたから
きみに会いたくてやって来たんだ
みんなで歌おう
終わらないメロディ
キラメキに乗って☆

届いてるかな？ 私の声 (はっきりと)
届けたいのは きみに笑顔 (そのスマイル！)
理想の遠さに悔しくて
みんなと泣き笑ったね
ぎゅっとぎゅっと
ぎゅっとぎゅっと
全て抱きしめて (いっしょに)
行こう どこまでも (Are You Ready？)
準備はOK！すすめ！！
希望の道を (123)
(キラメキライダー☆)

好きな気持ち カラフルに奏でたいな
最高の場所 最高のみんなと
ここにいるよ 幻なんかじゃない
きみのココロが 幸せに染まるように
重ねてくハーモニー
キラメキまとって☆

歌い続けたいな
踊り続けたいな
そんな願いや ワガママもいいでしょ？
だって楽しすぎて！ もう止まらない！！
輝くステージで もっともっと！！ (お願い)
ずっと！！ (オー) (イェーイ)

嬉しい楽しい愛しい だけじゃ語れない
今も今も 悩みはあるけど
ここにいるよ 私ここにいるよ
きみと同じ世界を 見つめて (いくよ！)
(キラメキライダー☆)

生まれたてのドキドキを 響かせよう
最高の時間 最高の仲間と
ここにいるよ 見つけてくれたから
きみに会いたくてやって来たんだ
みんなで歌おう (せーの)
終わらないメロディ
キラメキに乗って☆
キラメキまとって☆ (イェーイ)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Let's let the newborn excitement resonate
A time of the best, with the best companions
Ride on the sparkle☆ (Yeah!)
Do you remember? The first song (How nostalgic)
My voice was shaking (Just a little bit)
The future that continues from that day
Is today that we grabbed with everyone
More, more, more, more, accelerating heart
(Together) Let's go, anywhere
(Are You Ready?) Are you prepared? Open!! The door of dreams
(123) (Kirameki Rider☆)

Let's let the newborn excitement resonate
A time of the best, with the best companions
I am here, because you found me
I wanted to see you, so I came
Let's sing together, an unending melody
Ride on the sparkle☆

Is it reaching you? My voice (Clearly)
What I want to deliver is a smile to you (That smile!)
I was frustrated by the distance of the ideal
I cried and laughed with everyone
Tight, tight, tight, tight, embrace everything
(Together) Let's go, anywhere
(Are You Ready?) Are you prepared! Go!! The road of hope
(123) (Kirameki Rider☆)

I want to play my feelings colorfully
A place of the best, with the best companions
I am here, it's not an illusion
So that your heart is dyed in happiness
Layering harmony, wearing the sparkle☆
I want to keep singing, I want to keep dancing
Such wishes and selfishness are okay, right?
Because it's too fun! It won't stop anymore!!
On the shining stage, more and more!! (Please)
Always!! (Oh) (Yeah!)
I can't express it with just happy, fun, beloved
Even now, even now, I have worries
But I am here, I am here
Looking at the same world as you
(Let's go!) (Kirameki Rider☆)

Let's let the newborn excitement resonate
A time of the best, with the best companions
I am here, because you found me
I wanted to see you, so I came
Let's sing together (One, two!) an unending melody
Ride on the sparkle☆
Wear the sparkle☆ (Yeah!)
